\centry{Brightside Capital Group}{Business Analyst}{Chicago, IL}{July 2018 -- December 2019}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Supported a team of six investment analysts in due diligence, financial modeling, and portfolio monitoring for a \$280M mid-market private equity fund
  \item Built LBO and DCF models for seven deal evaluations, preparing summary memos and recommendation decks presented to the investment committee
  \item Automated monthly portfolio reporting using Python and Excel VBA, cutting turnaround time from three days to four hours
  \item Coordinated data room setup and documentation for two completed acquisitions with combined enterprise value of \$95M
\end{itemize}
